question: How many days after the UK defence secretary resigned did the June 2026 G7 summit start?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
John Healey resigned as UK Defence Secretary on **June 11, 2026**. The G7 summit in Évian, France, began on **June 15, 2026**.

That is **4 days** after the resignation.

Sources: [Al Jazeera](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/6/11/britains-defence-%E2%81%A0minister-healey-quits-over-defence-spending), [Council of the EU](https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/meetings/international-summit/2026/06/15-17/)

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
The UK defence secretary resigned on **11 June 2026**, and the G7 summit began on **15 June 2026**—**4 days later**.

Sources: [Reuters](https://www.reuters.com/world/uk/british-defence-minister-healey-resigns-over-defence-spending-2026-06-11/), [Council of the EU](https://www.consilium.europa.eu/en/meetings/international-summit/2026/06/15-17/)
